project: PRJ00224 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9861 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: RIH 11:00 am RSS#1-4 close and confirm RSS#5-8 open

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Finish installation of upper straddle and inflow test. If all is good will start rigging down off DFA-16 in the afternoon. Carry on with post job maintenance and general prep for next caliper run on HBA-22 which is still scheduled for Wed 06/05/26

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
PRJ00224 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9861 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Equipment is due to be mobilised midday today and Crew will be required tonight to start Rig up. estaimated logging will start Tomorrow evening.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Leak Detection Run Done. Now R/D on MFB11. Once done we are going to move to DFB16

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: GR/CCL run for HUD. Run 1 was unable to pass TRSSSV. Run 2 Using the same tools was able to reach bottom and log HUD. HUD is 10 meters above expected. Data shared with client. Equipment packed after the job and sent to EXLOG Base.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Next well will be HBA-22. According to the program there is a MFC run with no FTA required. Latest lookahead has Wednesday 06/05/26 for rigging up MFC, pending current operations on HBA-16.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: After running drift for straddle on slickline, rigged over to eline to set the lower packer of the straddle element. Once complete will rig back over to slickline to set the remainder. Continue with post MFC FIT checks/paperwork.
